task_name: Stock Trading Regret-Based Greedy Algorithm Implementation

subtask1.query: Please read workspace/README.md to understand the task requirements. You need to solve a stock trading problem with transaction fees and provide a complete C++ implementation. Refer to the algorithm hints in the context/ directory. After completion, save the C++ code as solution.cpp in the current directory.
deliverables: solution.cpp - A C++ algorithm implementation that can pass large-scale test cases
